Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT QUINTEC INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Bring Action To Trial Within Five Years
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS KEYSTONE SHIPPING COMPANY, and CROWLEY MARITIME CORPORATION'S Motion to Dismiss Action for Failure to Bring Action to Trial Within Five Years. Appearances: David R. Boyajian, Esq. of Emard Danoff Port Tamulski & Paetzold, LLP, (415) 227-9455; appearing for Crowley Maritime Corporation, and Keystone Shipping Co., Defendants and moving party. (415) 227-9455.
